use_cases: Selecting a single option from a list of choices in a form
Enabling multiple selections with checkbox behavior
Creating survey or quiz selection interfaces
Displaying selectable plan or feature options
ai_summary: A reusable Choicebox component that functions as a selection group supporting both radio (single-select) and checkbox (multi-select) behaviors. Each choice item displays a title and description with visual state changes between selected and unselected states using blue accent colors for active states and gray for inactive states. Built with Tailwind CSS for flexible layout direction (row/column) and basic transition animations on state changes.
